# The Great Analysis Challenge

> Polyglot chess engine benchmark with a shared spec, Docker-first execution, and cross-language verification.

Use this file as a compact map of canonical project docs.

## Mandatory Rules (Summary)

- Follow `CHESS_ENGINE_SPECS.md` for engine behavior and CLI protocol.
- Follow `AI_ALGORITHM_SPEC.md` for deterministic minimax + alpha-beta behavior.
- Keep implementation workflows Docker-only via root `Makefile` targets.
- Use standard library only for chess engine logic.
- Avoid non-package-manager external downloads in Dockerfiles.

## Primary Entry Points

- [README.md](README.md): Project overview and live implementation matrix.
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): Documentation hub by role/task.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Operational instructions and constraints for AI agents.

## Specifications

- [CHESS_ENGINE_SPECS.md](CHESS_ENGINE_SPECS.md): Authoritative rules, commands, legality, FEN, perft.
- [AI_ALGORITHM_SPEC.md](AI_ALGORITHM_SPEC.md): AI search and evaluation contract.

## Contribution and Implementation Guides

- [docs/CONTRIBUTING.md](docs/CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution process and PR expectations.
- [docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDELINES.md](docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDELINES.md): Implementation checklist, required files/labels, validation flow.

## Build/Test Automation

- [Makefile](Makefile): Canonical `make image/build/analyze/test/test-unit-contract/test-chess-engine` targets.
- [workflow](workflow): Shared Bun CLI for verification, testing, benchmarking, reporting, and issue triage.
- [tooling/](tooling): Bun/TypeScript implementation of the shared tooling stack.
- [test/test_suite.json](test/test_suite.json): Shared behavioral test definitions.
- [test/contracts/unit_v1.json](test/contracts/unit_v1.json): Shared unit-scope parity contract.

## Supporting References

- [docs/reference/language-statistics.md](docs/reference/language-statistics.md): Language statistics data maintenance.
- [language_statistics.yaml](language_statistics.yaml): Source statistics dataset.
- [docs/ISSUE_TRIAGE_WORKFLOW.md](docs/ISSUE_TRIAGE_WORKFLOW.md): Automatic issue triage behavior.
- [docs/prd/README.md](docs/prd/README.md): PRD roadmap for next-level features.
- [docs/archive/quarantine-summary.md](docs/archive/quarantine-summary.md): Archived quarantine context.
